task.title: Migrate source to domain-led CodeWiki layers
task.summary: Restructure CodeWiki source so domain concepts power DDD and application code contains compilers, gateways, state engine, and agent-facing tools over those domain concepts.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki source follows the documented dependency direction: adapters/UI/skills call application tools, application compilers/gateways/state-engine use domain concepts, and domain owns task/roadmap/session/build/validation/state semantics.
acceptance: Domain modules exist for task, roadmap, session queue, build, validation, and state concepts, with product semantics moved out of broad application modules where practical.
Application exposes agent-callable tool APIs that Pi tools, future adapters, skill helpers, and optional CLIs can call without owning semantics.
Application compiler modules exist for feedback, documentation, planning, and implementation flows, even if migration starts with wrappers around existing implementations.
Application gateway modules are separated by validation profile and do not collapse into compiler build production.
State-engine naming owns generated state/graph rebuild/query behavior while graph remains the generated representation.
Dependency checks or tests prevent domain importing application/adapters/UI/skills/scripts and prevent application importing adapters/UI/skills/scripts.
non_goals: Do not change user-facing behavior except import/path compatibility required by the refactor.
Do not remove legacy compatibility exports until downstream adapters/tests are migrated.
verification: source-owned architecture/audit check covers dependency direction

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Extracted roadmap task-boundary semantics into domain layer with application compatibility re-export.

evidence: Existing roadmap task boundary smoke test covers extracted semantics through compatibility import.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: src/application/task-boundary.ts re-exports domain functions/types for compatibility.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Existing roadmap task boundary smoke test covers extracted semantics through compatibility import.
code_change_evidence: src/application/task-boundary.ts re-exports domain functions/types for compatibility.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Domain modules exist for task, roadmap, session queue, build, validation, and state concepts, with product semantics moved out of broad application modules where practical.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Moved roadmap task-boundary assessment/assertion semantics from src/application/task-boundary.ts into src/domain/roadmap/task-boundary.ts; application module now re-exports compatibility surface.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Do not remove legacy compatibility exports until downstream adapters/tests are migrated.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/application/task-boundary.ts remains as compatibility re-export, preserving existing imports.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Dependency checks or tests prevent domain importing application/adapters/UI/skills/scripts and prevent application importing adapters/UI/skills/scripts.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: npm run check:architecture passes after adding src/domain/roadmap/task-boundary.ts.

closure_brief.user_intent: Continue TASK-087 with small task-boundary domain extraction slice.
implemented_changes: Moved task-boundary semantics into domain roadmap module.
remaining_risks: TASK-087 remains open for additional domain module extraction and compiler/gateway/state split.

risks: Implementation build uses prior dependency-guard planning build because no separate planning build exists for this extraction slice; should be validated or followed by planning correction if policy requires exact planning ref.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-087 Migrate source to domain-led CodeWiki layers implementation evidence
commit.body:
Extracted roadmap task-boundary semantics into domain layer with application compatibility re-export.

Checks: npm run typecheck, node tests/smoke/roadmap-task-boundary.test.mjs, npm run check:architecture
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
